name: Cinnamon Chip Bread: 2-pound Loaf
recipeIngredient: 4 Cups King Arthur Unbleached All-Purpose Flour®
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the cinnamon chips into the bread machine pan.
2. Program for raisin or mixed bread and start the machine.
- For Zo V20, set digital timer to 27 minutes.
3. Add the cinnamon chips at signal.
